message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2018 – German General Social Survey",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2018],
      "topics": [
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Specific social services: use and availability",
        "Employment",
        "Migration"
      ],
      "description": "Biennial representative survey of adults in Germany covering political attitudes and behaviour, social services and welfare, employment and work, and attitudes toward migration."
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2016 – German General Social Survey",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2016],
      "topics": [
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Specific social services: use and availability",
        "Employment",
        "Migration"
      ],
      "description": "National cross-sectional survey of the German population with modules on politics, social welfare, public services, employment, and migration-related attitudes."
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2014 – German General Social Survey",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2014],
      "topics": [
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Specific social services: use and availability",
        "Employment",
        "Migration"
      ],
      "description": "German general social survey focusing on political orientations, social policy and services, labor market status, and views on migration."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2011 – Health and Health Care: Germany",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2011],
      "topics": [
        "Specific diseases, disorders and medical conditions",
        "Specific social services: use and availability",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Physical fitness and exercise"
      ],
      "description": "German component of the International Social Survey Programme module on health, including topics like health conditions, health behaviors, access to health services, and evaluations of health policy."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2016 – Role of Government V: Germany",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2016],
      "topics": [
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Specific social services: use and availability",
        "Migration",
        "Employment"
      ],
      "description": "German ISSP module assessing attitudes toward government responsibilities, welfare policies, public services, immigration, and labor market interventions."
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP 2015 – Work Orientations IV: Germany",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2015],
      "topics": [
        "Employment",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Specific social services: use and availability"
      ],
      "description": "German ISSP module focusing on employment, job values, work conditions, labor market participation, and related social policies."
    },
    {
      "title": "GLES 2017 – German Longitudinal Election Study: Post-Election Cross-Section",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2017],
      "topics": [
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Migration",
        "Social welfare policy"
      ],
      "description": "Post-election survey of the German electorate capturing vote choice, political attitudes, issue positions including migration and social policy, and evaluations of parties and government."
    },
    {
      "title": "GLES 2021 – German Longitudinal Election Study: Post-Election Cross-Section",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": [2021],
      "topics": [
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Migration",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Employment"
      ],
      "description": "National post-election study for the 2021 federal election covering voting behavior, party evaluations, policy preferences (including welfare, employment, and migration), and political engagement."
    },
    {
      "title": "Politbarometer – Trend Surveys (Germany)",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["1977–present"],
      "topics": [
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Migration"
      ],
      "description": "Continuous public opinion trend surveys in Germany archived by GESIS, including party preferences, government evaluations, and issue attitudes such as welfare and migration."
    },
    {
      "title": "GESIS Panel – Longitudinal Study (Germany)",
      "country": "Germany",
      "years": ["2013–present"],
      "topics": [
        "Political behaviour and attitudes",
        "Government, political systems and organisations",
        "Migration",
        "Employment",
        "Social welfare policy",
        "Specific social services: use and availability",
        "Physical fitness and exercise",
        "Specific diseases, disorders and medical conditions"
      ],
      "description": "Probability-based longitudinal panel of adults in Germany with repeated surveys on politics, social policy and services, labor market participation, health behaviors and conditions, and migration-related topics."
    }
  ]
}
